name: UBA : Sharing Link Sent to Guest
notes: Detects a sharing invitation being sent to a guest.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250903) Sharing Invitation Created
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Sharing Link Sent to Guest on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250903) Sharing Invitation Created
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Sharing Link Sent to Guest
